name: Threads (Meta)
description: API to read and publish content to Instagram Threads, and manage Threads interactions for Business and Creator accounts.

auth_methods.note: Threads uses the Instagram Graph authentication model: OAuth 2.0 flows to obtain user access tokens (short- and long-lived) and app access tokens; App ID/Secret are issued in the App Dashboard. 'other' represents App ID/App Secret usage.

credential_access.note: Developers can create an app in the App Dashboard to get App ID and App Secret and obtain access tokens; development/testing can use test users without human approval. Access to production (non-test users) requires app review but initial credentials are self-servable.

api_surface.note: Threads API is part of the Instagram Graph API (Graph REST endpoints) and includes functionality to publish posts, replies, likes, read public content, profiles, webhooks, insights, and more.

buildability.note: You can create an app and obtain tokens immediately for development/test users; to operate on real user accounts beyond app roles you must complete app review and possibly business verification per Graph API and Platform Policy.

queries: Threads API get started create app
Meta App Dashboard create app App ID App Secret
Graph API app review access levels
Meta platform policy app review partner requirements
